argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const text = '{{ text }}'; const max = {{ max }} || 20; const skipReplied = {{ skip_replied }} !== false; const ct0 = document.cookie.split(';').map(c=>c.trim()).find(c=>c.startsWith('ct0='))?.split('=')[1]; if (!ct0) return { error: 'Not logged into x.com' }; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); let attempts = 0; while (attempts < 10) { const items = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid^="dm-conversation-item-"], [data-testid="conversation"]'); if (items.length > 0) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); attempts++; } const needed = max + 5; for (let scroll = 0; scroll < 10; scroll++) { const items = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid^="dm-conversation-item-"], [data-testid="conversation"]'); if (items.length >= needed) break; if (items.length > 0) { items[items.length - 1].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'instant', block: 'end' }); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); } const results = []; const conversationItems = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid^="dm-conversation-item-"], [data-testid="conversation"]'); for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(conversationItems.length, max); i++) { const item = conversationItems[i]; const testId = item.getAttribute('data-testid') || ''; const lines = (item.innerText || '').split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()); const username = lines[0] || 'Unknown'; const match = testId.match(/dm-conversation-item-(.+)/); const convId = match ? match[1].replace(':', '-') : ''; const link = item.querySelector('a[href*="/messages/"]'); const href = link ? link.href : ''; if (!convId && !href) { results.push({ index: i + 1, status: 'skipped', user: username, message: 'No conversation link' }); continue; } const convUrl = convId ? 'https://x.com/messages/' + convId : href; item.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); const dmHeader = document.querySelector('[data-testid="DmActivityContainer"] [dir="ltr"] span, [data-testid="conversation-header"], [data-testid="DmActivityContainer"] h2'); const chatUser = dmHeader ? dmHeader.innerText.trim().split('\n')[0] : username; if (skipReplied) { const chatArea = document.querySelector('[data-testid="DmScrollerContainer"], main'); const chatText = chatArea ? chatArea.innerText : ''; if (chatText.includes(text)) { results.push({ index: i + 1, status: 'skipped', user: chatUser, message: 'Already sent this message' }); continue; } } const input = document.querySelector('[data-testid="dmComposerTextInput"]'); if (!input) { results.push({ index: i + 1, status: 'skipped', user: chatUser, message: 'No input found' }); continue; } input.focus(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); document.execCommand('insertText', false, text); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const sendBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="dmComposerSendButton"]'); if (sendBtn) { sendBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); results.push({ index: i + 1, status: 'sent', user: chatUser, message: 'Message sent: ' + text.slice(0, 50) }); } else { results.push({ index: i + 1, status: 'error', user: chatUser, message: 'No send button found' }); } } return { results }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ index: 0, status: 'error', user: '', message: intermediate.error }]; return intermediate.results || []; }

description: Send DM replies to recent conversations
name: ReplyDM
